companies.name: Getir
companies.description: Getir is a mobile-only challenger FMCG retailer that operates 24/7, delivering groceries and other essential items on-demand. It expanded to multiple European cities and the U.S.

companies.name: TransferGo
companies.description: TransferGo offers international money transfers for both migrant workers & businesses using their digital account-to-account business model, allowing 4 million customers to send money to over 160 countries with lower fees and faster delivery.

companies.name: PayCore
companies.description: PayCore offers end-to-end payment solutions and services to banks, PSPs, e-money institutions, telecom operators, and retailers, providing payment software and technology solutions.

companies.name: V-Count
companies.description: V-Count provides people counting, queue management, zone analytics, real-time occupancy, and demographic analysis solutions for businesses to understand visitor behavior to improve day-to-day experiences and make data-driven decisions.

companies.name: Kredim
companies.description: Kredim is a Turkish company offering a "Buy Now, Pay Later" (BNPL) service, providing users with various repayment options for digital shopping.

companies.name: Ollang
companies.description: Ollang is disrupting content localization with artificial intelligence, offering natural-sounding AI dubbing in 60+ languages, high-quality subtitles, and studio dubbing services, serving Netflix, Youtube, content creators, TV/film companies, e-learning platforms, and podcast/audiobook producers.

companies.name: HyperBeeAI
companies.description: HyperBeeAI reduces computing costs via small-footprint ML models, enabling disruptive AI solutions. Their on-premises solutions provide data privacy, low cost of ownership, and high accuracy, and they developed a high-performing language model.

companies.name: Bluedot
companies.description: Bluedot is an EV charging platform with integrated loyalty rewards.

companies.name: Akinon
companies.description: Akinon is a headless commerce platform enabling rapid omnichannel retail.

companies.name: FileOrbis
companies.description: FileOrbis provides an intelligent file management platform that helps organizations manage, process, and utilize their digital files and data, enabling them to streamline operations, enhance collaboration, and maximize the value of their digital assets.

companies.name: Vivoo
companies.description: Vivoo is a mobile wellness app that provides personalized nutrition & lifestyle advice to users by tracking hydration, pH, ketone, salinity, magnesium ions, kidney health (track proteins), calcium, liver (bilirubin), free radicals (cancer and cell damage) via weekly urine tests.

companies.name: DefensX
companies.description: DefensX provides secure browser technology against browser-exploiting breaches using zero-trust threat prevention technology, ensuring user safety on any network or device, including desktops, laptops, and iOS & Android.

companies.name: Ikas
companies.description: Ikas provides e-commerce software to SMBs, offering a SaaS solution that enables businesses and entrepreneurs to quickly set up and run an online retail store and assisting their international commerce journey.

companies.name: Massive Bio
companies.description: Massive Bio is an AI-powered platform that connects cancer patients and their treating oncologists to clinical trials while enabling pharmaceutical companies to get access to patients and their information to speed up drug development.

companies.name: Param
companies.description: A Turkish financial technology company that offers full-stack services including issuing, acquiring, processing, lending, open banking and loyalty solutions.

companies.name: Eloquent AI
companies.description: Eloquent AI is the AI Operator for Financial Services.

companies.name: Monq
companies.description: Monq is an AI negotiation platform optimizing strategic enterprise procurement deals.

companies.name: Alpaka Games
companies.description: Alpaka Games is a mobile game company based in Istanbul, Turkey, that produces and publishes hybrid-casual games in the action genre.

companies.name: MYTH AI
companies.description: MYTH AI streamlines fashion design by using its proprietary AI platform to transform concepts into brand-aligned, commercially safe, production-ready collections within seconds, cutting costs, waste, and lead times.

companies.name: Boby AI
companies.description: Boby AI is a generative AI-native mobile app studio building globally scalable consumer products, starting with Mozart AI, a music generation app that lets users instantly create personalized songs.

companies.name: Virgosol
companies.description: Virgosol is transforming the software testing industry with its full-stack platform that unifies test management, automation, and performance testing. It leverages Generative AI to automate the entire QA lifecycle, boosting speed and accuracy.

companies.name: Eachlabs
companies.description: Eachlabs is an AI model marketplace and low-code workflow platform that simplifies the development of advanced AI-powered applications, making them faster, easier, and more accessible.

companies.name: Kahuna
companies.description: Kahuna empowers independent artists with predictive royalty funding.

companies.name: Midas
companies.description: Midas is a retail investment app in Turkey offering low commission trading, fractional shares, and US equities, aiming to become a comprehensive wealth management platform with access to Borsa Istanbul (BIST), exchange rates, cryptocurrency, and alternative investment tools.

companies.name: Onlayer
companies.description: Onlayer is an AI risk intelligence platform streamlining merchant compliance.

companies.name: Flowla
companies.description: Flowla streamlines complex sales and onboarding by replacing scattered emails and PDFs with AI-powered, CRM-connected shared deal rooms that centralize action plans, documents, signing, and real-time engagement insights.

companies.name: Cendra
companies.description: Cendra provides an AI-powered property operations platform for the global hospitality industry.

companies.name: Roamless
companies.description: Roamless offers a single eSIM technology providing data, calling, SMS, and local numbers as an all-in-one solution, with a pay-as-you-go model for global mobile connectivity.

companies.name: Martı
companies.description: Marti is the leading micro-mobility company across the MENA region, offering a multi-modal fleet for riders to conveniently, affordably, and quickly complete intracity trips.

companies.name: Metrobi
companies.description: Metrobi provides a technology-powered fulfillment network for local wholesale, delivering products from local food & beverage makers to grocery stores, restaurants, and cafes.

companies.name: OMMA
companies.description: OMMA is a visual marketing engine that allows companies to interact with their audience in real time on digital signage screens and mobile devices, offering two SaaS products that connect and enhance marketing communication in the digital and brick-and-mortar worlds.

companies.name: Marti
companies.description: Marti is a mobility provider, operating a fleet of e-scooters, e-bikes, and e-mopeds.

companies.name: Wellbees
companies.description: Wellbees is a B2B SaaS wellbeing mobile app developed for employees, offering company culture-specific events and content covering eight wellbeing areas, serving 17 countries with expert support and improving employee wellbeing through customized experiences.

companies.name: SmartMessage
companies.description: SmartMessage helps leading brands scale communications over millions of customers in real-time & create better experiences via efficient omnichannel marketing.

companies.name: Fazla
companies.description: Fazla enables companies to create the highest environmental, social, and financial value from food, packaging, textile, and chemical surplus via tech-enabled, holistic waste management solutions, saving food from being wasted and preventing carbon emissions.

companies.name: Bolt
companies.description: Bolt is a real-time digital market research platform driven by people’s unique behaviors and interests.

companies.name: Trio Mobil
companies.description: Trio Mobil is a technology company providing Industrial IoT solutions to prevent accidents and improve efficiency for safer and more productive industrial operations. Their AI-driven platform connects and orchestrates smart sensors with real-time analytics.

companies.name: SOCRadar
companies.description: An Extended Threat Intelligence (XTI) SaaS platform that combines External Attack Surface Management (EASM), Digital Risk Protection Services (DRPS), and Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI).

companies.name: Getmobil
companies.description: Getmobil is a marketplace platform uniting small and medium-sized businesses buying and selling second-hand electronic products to Turkish consumers, certified as a renewal center by the Turkish Ministry of Trade.

companies.name: Flow48
companies.description: Flow48 revolutionizes SME lending by providing crucial working capital financing through a platform that integrates with ERP, payment gateway, and e-commerce players to validate and underwrite short-term credit products focused on SMEs’ revenue and predictability.

companies.name: Vomolab
companies.description: Vomolab is a node-based studio that redefines production with artificial intelligence for brands and creative teams. It brings together different text, visual, video and audio models on a single platform; It allows users to produce professional content without the need for any technical knowledge. Thus, users can manage the entire production process from a single place without switching between multiple subscriptions or tools.

companies.name: RotaGo
companies.description: RotaGo is the first artificial intelligence platform that optimizes the operations and pricing of intercity bus companies in a data-oriented way. Its special model, trained with millions of trip data, analyzes past trends and produces future-oriented profitability-oriented strategies and makes prices dynamic in real time. RotaGo, which is actively used in 4 companies, is also continuing demo processes with 2 companies.

companies.name: Metallai
companies.description: Metallai is a material innovation platform that eliminates trial and error in metal production and manages alloy design and process optimization in real time with its proprietary artificial intelligence model.

companies.name: Medikte
companies.description: Medikte is an AI-supported SaaS solution developed by physicians that automatically transcribes patient interviews into text. Thanks to its artificial intelligence specially trained for Turkish medical terminology, it minimizes the time spent on documentation and maximizes the quality of records.

companies.name: Leveragai
companies.description: It is a SaaS platform that produces customizable training content in minutes with generative artificial intelligence. Users can obtain up-to-date and high-quality content at a low cost, and can also receive a certificate from Amsterdam Tech. In addition to training content, voice-over, artificial intelligence assistant and video courses also support users in the learning process.

companies.name: Docbook
companies.description: Docbook is a note-taking application that organizes and categorizes your notes with artificial intelligence. It was established with TÜBİTAK BiGG investment and has completed the testing process and opened to its first users.

companies.name: Digiless
companies.description: Digiless is a behavior transformation application focused on solving the global digital addiction problem by offering AI-supported personal guidance. It transforms addictions into healthy habits by applying its agent Fenix, which offers personalized guidance, and scientific methods. Digiless aims to increase the quality of life of its users by proving its market fit with global subscription sales on the AppStore.

companies.name: Bluearf
companies.description: Bluearf enables companies to perform all their sustainability calculations, analyses and reporting, including their supply chains, quickly, reliably and effortlessly from a single point in accordance with local and global standards with its AI-supported sustainability management platform.

companies.name: GingerLive
companies.description: Gingerlive is a new generation advertising platform that brings brands and publishers together with real-time advertisements, offering ads integrated into broadcasts on Twitch and Kick platforms with its AI-based image and audio technology Streamsense, which does not disrupt the viewer experience.

companies.name: Feedance
companies.description: Feedance enhances conversions and advertising efficiency in e-commerce, travel, automotive, legal betting and retail sectors by transforming raw product data into high-performance, optimized feeds. Feedance, which received the Best Use of Technology of the Year award at the MarTech Awards 2025, contributes to the growth of brands by providing creative production and conversion optimization for thousands of products.

companies.name: Digiforming
companies.description: Digiforming transforms press lines with artificial intelligence, enabling zero defects and maximum efficiency, and defines a new industry standard with its patented technology. It achieves up to 100% error prevention success in automotive factories, while shaping the autonomous press factories of the future by integrating AI-supported solutions such as end-of-line quality control, press protection and equipment tracking.

companies.name: Boost
companies.description: Boost provides an AI-powered, actionable sales analytics and reporting solution for companies, ready to use in weeks. A graduate of Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub, Boost Intelligent Analytics serves brands such as Mars, Red Bull, and Dimes, and its reports are actively used by over 300 users.

companies.name: Anytime
companies.description: Anytime is a next-generation career platform that focuses on the problem of youth unemployment, enabling young people to easily access flexible, part-time jobs, internships, and career opportunities through an AI-powered smart matching system. More than 15,000 young talents and 150+ employers meet many needs from seasonal workforce to talent acquisition through Anytime.

companies.name: Teleporter
companies.description: Teleporter is an immersive VR platform for gamers bringing the gaming community together in a metaverse.

companies.name: Veloxia
companies.description: Veloxia is a mobile gaming studio committed to developing and publishing innovative games in exciting genres.

companies.name: Fundomundo
companies.description: Fundomundo is a live-education marketplace of online classes and activities for kids.

companies.name: Yolda
companies.description: Yolda is a digital logistics operator enabling less-than-truckload (LTL) and full-truckload (FTL) shipments in Turkey and Germany.

companies.name: Pakolino
companies.description: Pakolino offers arts and crafts monthly subscription for children, expert approved activities that spark curiosity and creativity.

companies.name: Dekopasaj
companies.description: Dekopasaj is Turkey’s first secondhand furniture marketplace including pick-up, delivery, and online payment with installments.

companies.name: Cleanzy
companies.description: Cleanzy is a marketplace for online cleaning services in Turkey, Italy, Spain, and the UK.

companies.name: OdaPortal
companies.description: OdaPortal provides AI-powered photo enhancement solutions for the real estate industry.

companies.name: Mobilexpress
companies.description: Mobilexpress is an online payment services provider offering gateway solutions to e-commerce businesses.

companies.name: Synnada
companies.description: Synnada is a low-touch, self-contained ML tool that facilitates robust, high accuracy alerts in streaming data environments.

companies.name: Cenoa
companies.description: Cenoa is a Fintech startup reinventing banking products with blockchain/DeFi for everyday people.

companies.name: Prisync
companies.description: Prisync is a competitive dynamic pricing software serving 50+ countries, fully integrated with major e-commerce platforms including Magento and Shopify.

companies.name: UserGuiding
companies.description: UserGuiding is a customer experience management and onboarding software serving local and international enterprises in various sectors.

companies.name: AppSamurai
companies.description: AppSamurai is a user acquisition platform & real-time fraud solution that helps mobile applications & games to improve in-app engagement.

companies.name: AloTech
companies.description: AloTech is a leading provider of omnichannel call center software powered by Google Cloud.

companies.name: Heltia
companies.description: Heltia is a digital health startup aiming to provide personalized, evidence-based mental health support with a full spectrum of providers.

companies.name: Tarfin
companies.description: Tarfin is a digital platform in Turkey providing farmers with access to high quality farm inputs at flexible payment terms.

companies.name: Invent.ai
companies.description: Invent.ai is an AI-decisioning platform that gives retailers superpowers to make the best planning and operational decisions to increase revenue and margins.

companies.name: Venlo
companies.description: Venlo is a Turkish startup that aims to make healthcare services accessible, secure, and advantageous for all segments of society by providing financial digital solutions.

companies.name: InScope
companies.description: InScope is a Turkish fintech startup that provides financial solutions.

companies.name: PhiTech
companies.description: PhiTech is a local biotechnology startup that combines genomics and artificial intelligence technologies for rare diseases.

companies.name: Bucked Games
companies.description: Bucked Games is a game studio that develops educational and safe mobile games for children, designed to deliver fun without inappropriate content, collaborating with experts in game design and pedagogy. They also develop AI-powered game worlds tailored for children, schools, and institutions.
